name: objective-port
description: Variant B (failure path): Costa Rica and Guatemala sign a 10-tick treaty with a build_port objective on costa_rica, responsible party Costa Rica (partyA), deadline 8 ticks. Costa Rica never queues the build. Expected: objective status stays 'pending' until tick 9 (tickStarted=0 + deadlineTicks=8, so deadline=8; failure fires when world.tick+1 > 8, i.e. at tick 8 resolution). Costa Rica Trust −20, collateral (objective clause share) forfeited to Guatemala. Treaty continues to term end. See objective-port-met.json for Variant A (port built at T3, objective met at T5 when construction completes, Trust bonus fires, treaty auto-completes early).
